description_long: This object is a modern range hood with a sleek, rectangular base and a tall, vertical chimney. The base is wide and flat, likely designed to cover a standard cooking area, and features a small, rectangular control panel at the front center. The entire exterior is finished in a matte black color, giving it a contemporary and minimalistic appearance. The chimney rises from the center of the base and maintains a consistent width, suggesting a ducted design for venting air upwards. There are no visible filters, vents, or lighting fixtures on the exterior surfaces, indicating a streamlined design. The overall construction appears to be primarily metal, with possible plastic or glass elements for the control panel.
description: A matte black, modern range hood with a wide rectangular base, tall vertical chimney, and a small front control panel.
description_view_0: Front view showing the wide base, tall chimney, and a small rectangular control panel at the center front.
description_view_1: Rear view displaying the back of the chimney and base, with no visible controls or features.
description_view_2: Side view highlighting the depth of the base and the vertical rise of the chimney, with no visible controls.
description_view_3: Opposite side view, similar to view 2, showing the plain side profile of the range hood.
attribute_control_panel_type: Rectangular touch or push button panel located at the center front of the base.
attribute_vent_placement: Vents are not visibly present on the exterior; likely located on the underside or inside the base.
